51.reason: [The function 'qian' only searches forward (i+1 to end), but a continuous segment can extend backward from the current segment. Also, 'combo' accumulates both directions without resetting properly between segments.]

53.reason: [Same issue: 'hou' also only searches forward, not considering segments before index i. This leads to incomplete chain detection.]

66.reason: [This loop attempts to find the true start of the chain by going backward, but it only checks indices from 0 upward and may miss segments that appear later in the array due to unsorted input. The input is not sorted by x1, so earlier segments in coordinate space may appear later in the array.]

70.reason: [The logic for counting segments is flawed: 'maxcombo' counts connections, not segments. Adding 1 assumes a single starting segment, but due to incorrect traversal (only forward), the count may be wrong.]
